privileged_info_summary: The task requires evaluating network resilience in the Bologna Acosta scenario by simulating an incident that closes at least 2 edges. The agent must implement the incident using a SUMO rerouter file. Running the baseline simulation without any incidents yields approximately 8,779 completed trips, an average travel time of 276.18 seconds, an average time loss of 154.48 seconds, and 376.71 total vehicle-hours of delay. The agent must save its findings in specific files (baseline_network_performance.csv, incident_network_performance.csv, run_incident.sumocfg, incident_rerouters.add.xml, and incident_assessment_report.txt). The incident simulation must demonstrate plausible network degradation (increased travel time/delay or reduced completed trips) compared to the baseline.
